channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Left behind road traffic signs, 17th April
item.description:
This signs have been left cluttering the pavement for 2 months+ after works in the area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watergate Street, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By Junction Claremont with kilburn lane, 17th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped crackers or pita bread all over pavement- food waste regularly dumped at this spot please put CCTV on lampposts

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Newly planted trees leaning into traffic., 17th April
item.description:
The newly planted trees have come away from their fixing posts in the center island are leaning into traffic.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Streatham High Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 17th April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 17/04/26 15:44 Fly-tipping Lat/Long - 51.4203216, 0.0168146 what3words - sketch.proud.wishes Nearest address - 21 Southover, Bromley, BR1 4RU Looks like household waste dumped at brook lane/ Southover Reference - 5497725 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 17/04/2026 15:43 Looks like household waste dumped at brook lane/ Southover
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 17th April
item.description:
Someone dumped bags of clothes and rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-2, Kimmeridge Gardens, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Resident blocking parking spaces with 2 wheelie bins, 17th April
item.description:
A resident on this road has been using wheelie bins to block parking outside their home for 20+ months. The bins stick out so far into the road that traffic cannot pass, causing dangerous bottlenecks at rush hour on this busy cut through. This regularly causes arguments between drivers, near physical fights. It is getting worse, with more bins now appearing outside neighbouring properties and serious confrontations between residents. This is wilful obstruction of the public highway. Urgent enforcement action is needed before someone gets seriously hurt.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Birdbrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside st pancras gardens, 17th April
item.description:
The drain is blocked so the water from the leak is causing a huge puzzle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pancras Road, Somers Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A lot of recycling rubbish not collected, 17th April
item.description:
After a few weeks with no collection, many items are now in public space car park, causing a terrible mess and not safe where lots of young children are playing. needs to be collected asap.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shushan Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste/ building waste/ household waste - again, 17th April
item.description:
Once again this space has been used to dump large waste - including a fridge freezer. I have lost count of how many times I have reported this and it is frustrating to see Tina and again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black Bag Dumped, 17th April
item.description:
Bag of rubbish left next to the parking machine on Woodlands Park Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tyler Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadwork Barriers, 17th April
item.description:
X2 Roadwork barriers left against the wall on Woodlands Park Road for over 2 weeks now.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Earlswood Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown vegetation, 17th April
item.description:
The pathway is currently inaccessible due to severely overgrown vegetation, which poses a significant safety hazard to pedestrians. This issue has persisted for the past three years and continues to deteriorate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Patterdale Close, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple rubbish bags dumped, 17th April
item.description:
Multiple rubbish bags have been dumped behind the flats and shops at 276–280 High Street. This is unsightly, poses a potential health hazard, and creates an unpleasant environment for local residents. Could you please confirm who is responsible for these bags? Is the waste connected to the recently burnt-out kebab shop? Additionally, have any complaints been raised with the landowners or the contractors involved with the kebab shop?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regal Alley, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car for 3 months, 17th April
item.description:
This car was reported previously Ref 9017225 at 3 weeks of it being parked and we were advised at the time it is taxed and so no further action could be taken but it is not nearly 3 months and it has not been moved and is causing a fair bit of inconvenience for our entry into our property as well as causing traffic issues especially at school run time as we have Bromley High School at the top end of the road as it is a very busy through road. We would appreciate if action can be take for it to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oldfield Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Man hole cover missing on 2 deep drains, 17th April
item.description:
So dangerous - needs urgent attention What 3 words location ClubMangaKinks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Two items left on pavement in Meadowcourt Road, 17th April
item.description:
Someone has chosen to dump the two items in the road. They are on the right as you enter Meadowcourt Road from Lee Road, just before you get to Canal Walk.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowcourt Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp, wood etc flytipped, 17th April
item.description:
A tall lamp stand, wooden planks and other general litter dumped in the flowerbeds by the railway bridge, near the black railings.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot hole on the bend of main road leading from station road, 17th April
item.description:
Pot hole been there for a few months now and it’s getting bigger and will damage cars tyres
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter, 17th April
item.description:
There is a persistent issue with litter on Kingsdale Road. I reported it the other day and it's already back looking like this. As it's near a school and just off the high street, perhaps it could be added to the street cleaner's rounds? Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees are blocking light to the footpath, 17th April
item.description:
The trees have not been cut back enough (again) leave dark and blind spots between White Horse Hill and Hill Close. Telegraph Path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telegraph Path, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
